name: BLE ADV Proxy
author: Ava
description: ha-ble-adv BLE proxy. Scan nearby devices and control fans or lamps.
detail_description: Enabling this disables Ava Bluetooth proxy. This mod owns BLE scan and TX for ha-ble-adv.

config.label: Enable BLE ADV Proxy
config.description: Expose ble_adv_proxy services and events to Home Assistant.

config.label: Max TX Power
config.description: Use highest BLE advertise TX power when sending control packets. Recommended for fan/lamp control.

config.label: Force BLE Broadcast
config.description: On (default) forces standard BLE broadcast, works on all phones. Turn off only on rooted devices with kernel HCI for true 1:1 with Flags.

config.label: Adapter Name
config.description: Optional unique adapter name for ha-ble-adv. Leave blank to use the Ava device name.
